settings.question: What payment methods do you accept?
settings.answer: We accept Visa, Mastercard, PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and Klarna.

settings.question: Can I cancel my order?
settings.answer: You can cancel within 2 hours of placing your order. After that, production begins and cancellation is no longer possible.

settings.question: Is my payment information secure?
settings.answer: Yes. All transactions are encrypted with industry-standard SSL technology. We never store your full payment details.

settings.question: Where do you ship?
settings.answer: We ship worldwide. Free shipping on orders over €100 within Europe.

settings.question: How long does delivery take?
settings.answer: Europe: 5–10 business days. North America: 7–14 business days. Rest of world: 10–20 business days. Print-on-demand items may add 2–5 additional days.

settings.question: Can I track my order?
settings.answer: Yes. You'll receive a confirmation email with tracking information once your order ships.

settings.question: What is your return policy?
settings.answer: We accept returns within 30 days of delivery. Items must be unworn, unwashed, and in original condition with tags attached.

settings.question: How do I return a product?
settings.answer: Email contact@iseeyoufeel.com with your order number. We'll provide return instructions.

settings.question: When will I receive my refund?
settings.answer: Refunds are processed within 5–7 business days after we receive your return.

settings.question: What sizes do you offer?
settings.answer: XS to 3XL. Check our size guide for detailed measurements.

settings.question: Are your products eco-friendly?
settings.answer: We work with responsible suppliers and our print-on-demand model eliminates overproduction and excess inventory.
